warnings: Current S&P 500 cache is not point-in-time; survivorship bias may remain.

verdict.headline: No evidence this rule beats holding a low-cost ETF.
verdict.headline_zh: 没有证据表明这条规则比持有低成本 ETF 更好。
reasons: It did not beat random stock picks on the same dates (p-value: 1.000 >= 0.05).
It did not beat random ETF timing (p-value: 0.997 >= 0.05).
It trailed passive buy-and-hold SPY (-9.06% CAGR vs 11.75% CAGR).
Because the rule's return is negative or near zero, beta share is not meaningful.
